trainer.name: Sophia Simões
trainer.title: Staff QA Engineer
trainer.description: QA leader specializing in AI-augmented testing, cost-optimized CI/CD, and DevSecOps. Reduced production incidents by 40% while cutting infrastructure costs in half.

experiences.summary: Lead quality strategy for payments unit. Reduced production incidents by 40%. Pioneered AI-augmented testing with LLMs + CrewAI agents.
Led squad of 7 QAs across 3 product teams. Architected device farm for POS testing (60% manual effort reduction). Integrated SonarQube + MobSF into CI.
Technical QA leadership for enterprise digital media. Built automation frameworks with Ruby, Cucumber, Appium, Jenkins CI. Championed Specification by Example.
Delivered QA strategies for Fortune 500 clients. Implemented BDD practices with Cucumber + SpecFlow. Mentored teams on TDD and continuous testing.
Executed manual and automated testing for banking clients. Developed test scripts in Java + Selenium. Participated in agile transformation initiatives.
Performed functional and regression testing for enterprise software. Created test cases using HP Quality Center. Learned fundamentals of SDLC.
Supported QA team with test execution and bug reporting. Gained exposure to ISTQB methodologies. First steps in software testing career.
Side projects for startups. Test automation setup, CI/CD pipeline consulting, and AI-powered testing workshops. Keeping skills sharp.

education.focus: Software quality, embedded systems, test automation
QA processes, Agile, TestLink, Bizagi/Enterprise Architect

certifications.name: ISTQB Advanced Level - Test Automation Engineer

projects.title: AI Test Agents with CrewAI
projects.description: Autonomous agents that generate, execute, and review test cases using local LLMs (Ollama) + CrewAI orchestration.

projects.title: Cost-Optimized CI/CD
projects.description: Refactored test pyramid + parallel execution strategy that reduced infrastructure costs by 50% while improving reliability.

projects.title: POS Device Farm
projects.description: Custom device farm for payment terminal testing, reducing manual validation effort by 60% and accelerating firmware releases.

projects.title: DevSecOps Gates
projects.description: Integrated static analysis (SonarQube, MobSF, SDAT) into CI pipelines, catching 90% of critical vulnerabilities pre-merge.

projects.title: AR Research (Academic)
projects.description: Early research on object trajectory prediction using Augmented Reality + computer vision (UNIP, 2013).

projects.title: Wheelchair Prototype
projects.description: Hardware+software prototype for Bluetooth-based wheelchair control, combining embedded programming + accessible UX.
